title: Fluffy Earthy Spanish Rice Paella
description: A light, aromatic paella with fluffy rice, earthy vegetables, and a burst of fresh chives-perfect for a cozy date night.
instructions: In a small bowl, steep the saffron threads in 1/4 cup warm vegetable broth for 5 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a deep skillet or paella pan over medium heat.
Add the diced carrot and bell pepper, sautéing until they begin to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the short-grain rice, coating each grain with oil and allowing it to toast slightly, 2 minutes.
Pour in the remaining 2 1/2 cups of vegetable broth, the steeped saffron, smoked paprika, sea salt, and black pepper; bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low.
Cover the pan and let the rice simmer, allowing the liquid to be absorbed, about 10 minutes. Avoid stirring to maintain fluffy texture.
While the rice cooks, bring a small pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the peas for 1 minute, then drain and set aside.
After the initial 10 minutes, remove the lid, gently fluff the rice with a fork, and fold in the blanched peas and chopped artichoke hearts.
Return the lid, continue cooking for an additional 3-4 minutes until the rice is tender and fluffy.
Remove from heat, sprinkle chopped chives over the top, let rest for 2 minutes, then serve hot.
